calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing And Entry Of Default Judgment Upon Cross Complaint Against Gordon Thomas And Associates Inc
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to cross-defendants Gordon Thomas and Associates, Inc. and John Gordon.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Tommy Ryan Lee, Esq. appeared for National Response Team, as assignee of the cross-complaint of the Lam Family Recovable Trust, a California Trust.
Joshua Wikoff, Managing Member of National Response Team, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by cross-defendants Gordaon Thomas and Associates, Inc. or John Gordon.
Cross-complaint was filed on March 29, 2018.
Substitute service on cross-defendants Gordaon Thomas and Associates, Inc. and John Gordon on May 4, 2018, and was effectuated on May 18, 2018.
Default as to both cross-defendants was entered on July 18, 2018.
ROES 1 through 5 were dismissed on May 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of cross-complaint the Lam Family Revocable Trust, a California Trust, and against the defaulted cross-defendants Gordon Thomas and Associates, Inc. and John Gordon, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,725.85.
Costs - $477.00.

Total - $35,202.85.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL RESPONSE TEAM LLC'S Motion To Reopen Discovery; To Compel Attendance At Deposition, To Produce Documents; And To Answer Interrogatories.
